title: docs: update README — 2026-06-06
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily README update: Latest News + Recent Apps sections.

gist.headline: Daily README Refresh
gist.blurb: Our trusty bot gave the README its daily polish, keeping the news and apps sections fresh.
gist.summary: Automated daily update to the README file to refresh the Latest News and Recent Apps sections.
gist.impact: Visitors to the repository will see the most up-to-date community apps and news on the main page.
gist.visual_concept: A cute robot (Monitor Robot) and Polly the bee updating a giant digital billboard or a literal 'README' scroll in a cozy garden setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head and a tiny bee mascot painting a giant digital scroll in a lush garden. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
